title: centaurea seminutans
intro: Centaurea seminutans, also known as star thistle, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of silymarin, a flavonoid complex with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Centaurea seminutans include its ability to protect the liver, aid in digestion, and exhibit anti-arthritic and anti-inflammatory effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or dried herb, and can also be consumed as a tea or capsule to harness its medicinal properties.
